resolved_sublemmas.name: global repair-tick lemma
resolved_sublemmas.result: under the declared area-law counting model the readback fixed-point equation is equivalent to the closure transport G_N(1) = rho_star, giving the full-cycle multiplier (N_CRC/pi)^(-1/2); the declared 24-tick branch gives |g_*'| = (N_CRC/pi)^(-1/48)
resolved_sublemmas.declared_input: 24-round count (representation-to-spectrum derivation open); area-law counting model of Cap_read and single effective readback resolution (finite-machinery verification open)

resolved_sublemmas.name: joint product fixed-point/stability theorem
resolved_sublemmas.result: on the product-separated source map J(P,x)=(Gamma(P),C_hat(x)), component contractions give a unique stable joint fixed point; genuinely coupled source feedback requires the weighted-sup derivative condition max(a+b/r,d+r*c)<1

resolved_sublemmas.name: electroweak tick-projection bridge
resolved_sublemmas.result: Pi_EW(P,N)=24*pi/(alpha_U(P)*log(N/pi)); the target Pi_EW=4P is equivalent to B_EW(P,N)=alpha_U(P)*log(N/pi)-6*pi/P=0; rounded N_CRC=3.31e122 is diagnostic and fails the exact bridge residual

resolved_sublemmas.name: RG/coarse-graining naturality theorem
resolved_sublemmas.result: epsilon_n=epsilon_h=epsilon_H=0 on the selected exact source-to-Higgs normal-form square, with measured weak-scale and gravity inputs forbidden

promotion_requires: finite-machinery verification that nf_{r,N} delivers a single well-defined effective readback resolution
representation-to-spectrum theorem deriving the 24-round repair count
exact global capacity source certificate satisfying B_EW(P_star,N_CRC)=0
